inputs.RemediationPerformed: Disabled 12 inactive administrator accounts and removed privileged access.

expectedOutput.ValidationNotes: Revalidation reviewed the original access control finding that 12 inactive users retained administrator privileges. Remediation evidence states the 12 inactive administrator accounts were disabled and privileged access was removed. Current control state confirms no inactive administrator accounts are detected. Based on SOC 2 access control validation criteria, the remediation fully addresses the finding because inactive privileged accounts have been removed/disabled and no exception remains. Residual risk is low. Recommendation: close the finding.
